'''Slerog Fenn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]. Fenn presented himself in flashy clothes, and often adorned himself with earrings.

==Biography==
Fenn was a major rival to [[Loro Ecls]] in the [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Free Port]], running landing and repair facilities, known respectively as [[Fenn's Landing]] and [[Fenn's Warehouse]]. He tried to undercut his rival in a bid to take financial control of the port. Fenn used his numerous criminal connections to offset his competitive prices.

{{Char-stub}}
